zh.Galway, County Galway, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 高威高威
zh.Dominican church of Saints Peter and Pau: 愛爾蘭庫迪 高威阿騰利
zh.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien是Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien的女兒，於1270年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威。她於1290年與William Laith de Burgh在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威阿騰利。

zh-hans.Galway, County Galway, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 高威高威
zh-hans.Dominican church of Saints Peter and Pau: 爱尔兰庫迪 高威阿騰利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien是Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien的女儿，于1270年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 高威。她于1290年与William Laith de Burgh在爱尔兰庫迪 高威结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 高威阿騰利。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.

en.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien was born in 1270, in County Galway, Ireland as the daughter of Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien. She married William Laith de Burgh in 1290, in County Galway, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 1 daughter. She was buried in Athenry, County Galway, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien est née en 1270, à County Galway, Irlande, fille de Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien. Elle a épousé William Laith de Burgh en 1290, à County Galway, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Athenry, County Galway, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien wurde 1270 in County Galway, Irland, als Tochter von Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien geboren. Sie hat 1290 in County Galway, Irland William Laith de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in Athenry, County Galway, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien è nata il nel 1270 nel County Galway, Irlanda come figlia di Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien. Lei sposato William Laith de Burgh nel 1290, nel County Galway, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolta a Athenry, County Galway, Irlanda.

ja.Galway, County Galway, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ガルワイガルワイ
ja.Dominican church of Saints Peter and Pau: アイルランドコウントイ ガルワイアスエンリー
ja.County Galway, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ガルワイ
ja., Galway, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ガルワイ
ja.Connaught, Ireland: アイルランドコナウト
ja.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brienは1270年にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイでRoe 'red-haired' O'Brienの娘として生まれた。1290年にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイでWilliam Laith de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイアスエンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien(은)는 1270년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이에서 Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1290년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이에서 William Laith de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 앳헨리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien nasceu em 1270, em County Galway, Irlanda filha de Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien. Ela casou-se com William Laith de Burgh em 1290, em County Galway, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 1 filha. Ela foi sepultada em Athenry, County Galway, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien родилась в 1270 г. в местности коунти галвеи, Ирландия. Её отца звали Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Laith de Burgh в 1290 г. в местности коунти галвеи, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности афенри, коунти галвеи, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Finnoula O'Brien nació en 1270, en County Galway, Irlanda como hija de Roe 'red-haired' O'Brien. Se casó con William Laith de Burgh en 1290, en County Galway, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultada en Athenry, County Galway, Irlanda.
